basic_details.job_title: NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 116 Posts
basic_details.short_information: NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS) Regional Office Chandigarh recruitment notification 2026 for 116 Hostel Superintendent (58 Male & 58 Female) vacancies on contract basis in JNVs under Chandigarh Region covering Punjab, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu & Kashmir (U.T.), Ladakh (U.T.) and Chandigarh (U.T.) for the session 2026-27. The online application process starts on 13th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 25th May 2026. Find NVS vacancies on the official website navodaya.gov.in/nvs/ro/Chandigarh. You can also get Free Jo

important_dates.dates for personal talk: To be intimated later on NVS RO Chandigarh website

qualification.experience: Minimum 5 years' experience in pay level 5 or above of 7th CPC (or equivalent scale) in any recognized residential school
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfil all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 1st May 2026. Only candidates with prior experience in recognized residential schools are eligible. Both male and female candidates without encumbrances may apply. Health and fitness requirements are as per NVS norms applicable for regular appointment. Experience certificates from previously served institutions/defence establishments must clearly mention the date of issuance. | Educational Qualification

salary_details.details: The contractee is entitled to one casual leave per month, subject to approval by the Controlling Authority. All taxes including TDS will be deducted as per Income Tax Rules. The contractee will be provided shared single accommodation inside the campus, preferably in the Hostel if available. No TA/DA will be paid to candidates for appearing in the Personal Talk.

selection_process: Shortlisting Based on marks for educational qualifications and other qualifications against anticipated vacancies

Document Verification Self-attested photocopies (both sides) of all documents, mark lists of each semester/year, and original documents to be brought to the venue; valid Government-issued ID proof with photocopy also required
Personal Talk Held at designated centres communicated to shortlisted candidates via registered Email ID

Eligible candidates will be shortlisted for personal talk based on marks allotted for educational qualifications and other qualifications. Only shortlisted candidates (as per criteria fixed by the Samiti) will be informed for personal interaction on their registered Email ID. The selection process is conducted in physical mode only.
NVS reserves the right to modify the place of personal talk if required.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the portal https://www.supschooms.in. No other mode of application is accepted. The portal is active from 13.05.2026 to 25.05.2026. Candidates must use a correct and working email ID and mobile number; the registered email ID and mobile number should remain valid as all communications including shortlisting intimation and Personal Talk details will be sent to the registered email ID. All information filled in the form will be treated as final; if found false/wrong/misleading at any stage, the candidature will be rejected. Candidates are advised to visit the NVS RO Chandigarh website regularly for updates.
Candidates must ascertain their eligibility before filling up the application form.
Cut-off date for all eligibility criteria (age, experience, qualification) is 1st May 2026.
Vacancies are tentative and subject to change.
No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the Personal Talk.
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for document verification and personal interaction in physical mode.
Candidates must bring self-attested photocopies (both sides) of all documents along with originals and a valid Government-issued photo ID at the time of document verification.
Experience certificates must clearly mention the date of issuance from the previously served institutions/defence establishments.
Proficiency in regional language is desirable and will be verified during the personal talk; no documentary evidence is required for this.
The selected Hostel Superintendent must reside on the JNV campus as JNVs are residential in nature.
The engagement carries no right to regularization or claim on regular sanctioned positions of the Samiti.
Candidates are directed to visit the NVS RO Chandigarh website regularly for updates as no separate press advertisement will be issued.

faq.question: Q1. What is NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026 is a contractual engagement drive by Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti, Regional Office Chandigarh, to empanel 116 Hostel Superintendents (58 Male and 58 Female) for Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas in Punjab, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu & Kashmir (UT), Ladakh (UT) and Chandigarh (UT) for the academic session 2026‑27.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced and what is the nature of the post?
faq.answer: A total of 116 vacancies are notified, with 58 posts for Male Hostel Superintendents and 58 posts for Female Hostel Superintendents, and all these positions are purely on contract basis for one academic session only, with no claim for regularization in NVS.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application portal opens on 13 May 2026 and the last date for submission of online applications is 25 May 2026, while 1 May 2026 is the cut‑off date for determining age, qualification and experience eligibility for all candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria and required experience for NVS Hostel Superintendent (Chandigarh Region)?
faq.answer: Applicants must be graduates in any discipline and should have prior experience in recognized residential schools, such as a minimum of 5 years’ service in pay level 5 or above of 7th CPC, or 7 years on consolidated pay not less than Rs. 29,200 per month, or specified experience as ex‑defence personnel or ex‑JNV staff as detailed in the official guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent 2026?
faq.answer: For NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026, the minimum age for engagement is 35 years and the maximum permissible age is 62 years as on 1 May 2026, and candidates must ensure they fall within this age range on the cut‑off date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the monthly remuneration for NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent on contract?
faq.answer: Selected Hostel Superintendents will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 35,750 per month, along with entitlement to one casual leave per month, and they will be provided shared single accommodation within the JNV campus, subject to availability.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of shortlisting of eligible candidates based on marks for educational and other qualifications, followed by document verification and a Personal Talk (personal interaction) conducted in physical mode at designated centres, with only shortlisted candidates being called through their registered email IDs.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key duties and responsibilities of NVS Hostel Superintendents?
faq.answer: Hostel Superintendents in JNVs are responsible for maintaining cleanliness and discipline in dormitories, ensuring safety and security of students, supervising daily routine and movement, managing distribution of entitlement items, keeping hostel records, and residing in the campus full‑time while devoting their entire working hours to student welfare and hostel management.

faq.question: Q9. What are the main contract terms and tenure for NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent 2026‑27?
faq.answer: The engagement is purely contractual for the academic session 2026‑27, normally up to 31 March 2027, and the contract can be terminated by either side with one month’s notice or one month’s remuneration in lieu, and there is no automatic extension or right to claim continuation or regular appointment in NVS after the contract period.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply online for NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online only through the portal https://www.supschooms.in by selecting Chandigarh Region, using a valid email ID and mobile number, uploading required documents as per instructions, and regularly checking the NVS RO Chandigarh website for further updates on shortlisting and Personal Talk schedules.
